positions.title: Backend Engineer
positions.description: Build and scale our core platform services. You'll work on API design, database optimization, and infrastructure.

positions.title: Frontend Engineer
positions.description: Create delightful user experiences for our web application. Component architecture, performance, and accessibility.

positions.title: Product Designer
positions.description: Own the end-to-end design process from research to polished UI. Work closely with engineering and product.

positions.title: Developer Relations
positions.description: Be the bridge between our product and the developer community. Create content, speak at events, gather feedback.
